title: Young Franky and Iceburg
description: Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam. Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: with the explosive power of my legs...

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: I can kick the air and float...

dialogue.speaker: World Government agent
dialogue.text: They cut the wall with their kicks!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We met on the ship, RORONOA.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: So your inspection at the time...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: unfor- sunsetely for you... I was serious

summary: Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.
